news_data.title: Azure Revenue Grows 29% as Cloud Demand Surges
news_data.snippet: Microsoft's Intelligent Cloud segment posted $24.3B in revenue, driven by AI workload migration.

news_data.title: Microsoft Copilot Reaches 1M Enterprise Subscribers
news_data.snippet: AI-powered productivity assistant adoption accelerates across Office 365 enterprise customers.

news_data.title: Microsoft Reports $62.9B Q1 Revenue, Beats Estimates
news_data.snippet: All three business segments exceeded Wall Street expectations, with operating income up 24% YoY.

news_data.title: Microsoft Deepens OpenAI Partnership With $10B Investment
news_data.snippet: Extended partnership positions Microsoft as the primary commercial partner for GPT and DALL-E models.

news_data.title: Microsoft Gaming Revenue Jumps Post Activision Acquisition
news_data.snippet: Xbox content and services revenue grew 61% following the $69B Activision Blizzard integration.

social_data.title: MSFT Is the Safest Big Tech Bet
social_data.snippet: Azure is the enterprise default, Copilot is printing money, and they have the strongest AI moat via OpenAI.

social_data.title: Teams and Copilot Integration Review
social_data.snippet: Copilot meeting summaries are saving our team 5+ hours a week. Actually delivers on the AI productivity promise.

social_data.title: Azure vs AWS Migration Thread
social_data.snippet: Moved our infra to Azure last quarter. Hybrid cloud story and enterprise licensing bundles made the decision easy.

review_data.title: Microsoft Employee Review — Cloud Engineer
review_data.snippet: Excellent WLB, strong comp, and genuine growth culture under Nadella. Some teams are still siloed.

review_data.title: Microsoft Employee Review — PM
review_data.snippet: Collaborative environment with real impact at scale. Internal mobility is a huge perk.
